name: BEN_BILL_CALENDAR
description: This table is used to hold bill calendar periods for a given billing cycle

columns.Name: BILL_CAL_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PAY_TIME_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Foreign key to pay_time_periods.

columns.Name: BILL_CAL_SOURCE
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  billing source ben/pay.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Foreign key to pay_all_payrolls_f.

columns.Name: BILL_CYCLE_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Foreign key to ben_bill_cycle

columns.Name: BILL_YEAR
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Billing Year.

columns.Name: PERIOD_NAME
columns.Comments: Name generated by calendar generation process, should be unique.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Billing Start Date.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Billing End Date.

columns.Name: PYMNT_OVERDUE_DT
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Payment Overdue Date.

columns.Name: PYMNT_DUE_DT
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold  Payment Due Date.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold Comments.

columns.Name: BILL_CALC_RUN
columns.Comments: To indicate if all the persons billed for this period or not.

columns.Name: BILLING_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold billing date.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.
